commit.message:
Clean up direct rating: simplify button labels, rename mode

- Strike/Conflict buttons no longer show numeric prefix
- Mode renamed from 'Score Unknown Judges' to 'Direct Rating'
- Menu option renamed to 'Direct rating (interactive buttons)'

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

v0.0.5: response size reduction, veil synonyms, capability reconciliation

- Add tools/_response.py: compress_if_large() + image quality tier helpers
  Threshold driven by MAX_MCP_OUTPUT_TOKENS env var (default 25K tokens × 4 chars)
  Aligns automatically with Copilot CLI truncation cutoff

- get_project_info: strip images by default (include_images=False)
  Images replaced with guidance strings pointing to new dedicated tools

- Add get_plate_thumbnail(name, file_path, plate_num, quality='standard')
- Add get_plate_topview(name, file_path, plate_num, quality='standard')
  quality: 'preview' (~5 KB) / 'standard' (~16 KB, default) / 'full' (~71 KB)

- list_sdcard_files: wire path parameter to filter to subtree
  path='/' returns full tree (backward compat); any other path returns subtree
  Large trees compressed via compress_if_large()

- data_collector.py: add Collection.to_summary(), PrinterDataCollector.get_summary(),
  PrinterDataCollector.get_collection(), DataCollector.get_summary/get_collection

- get_monitoring_history: add raw=False default (returns lightweight summary)
  raw=True preserves existing full time-series behavior

- Add get_monitoring_series(name, field): full series for one field, compressed

- get_snapshot: add quality param + include_status param
  Quality tiers use PIL resize + JPEG re-encode
  include_status=True adds live print telemetry to response

- Extract _build_status() helper in camera.py; simplify start_stream status_fn

- view_stream: add overlay_active=True to return value

- get_printer_state: docstring updated to recommend targeted sub-tools

- .github/copilot-instructions.md: veil synonym support (lower/drop/close/enable,
  lift/raise/open/disable); version bumped to 0.0.5

- knowledge/behavioral_rules.py: multi-level hierarchy pattern, image quality tiers,
  compressed response protocol, MAX_MCP_OUTPUT_TOKENS configuration docs

- prompts/context.py: new tools, updated descriptions for changed tools

- pyproject.toml, README.md, PLAN.md: version 0.0.4 → 0.0.5; tool count 81 → 84

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

Defer optional dependency warnings to stage instantiation (#151)

* Initial plan

* Fix: Move optional dependency warnings from import-time to stage instantiation

- Make sklearn_stages.py, nltk_stages.py, skintegrate.py importable
  without optional deps by wrapping optional imports in try/except
- Add _SKLEARN_INSTALLED / _NLTK_INSTALLED flags
- Guard each class __init__ with ImportError when dep is missing
- Remove try/except warning blocks from __init__.py
- Add tests verifying ImportError raised when dep is mocked as absent"

Co-authored-by: shaypal5 <917954+shaypal5@users.noreply.github.com>

* Fix flake8, numpydoc CI, and patch coverage for optional dep guards

- Move skutil import inside sklearn try/except in sklearn_stages.py
  to fix numpydoc CI failure (skutil requires scipy which may be absent)
- Add # pragma: no cover to except ImportError branches in nltk_stages,
  sklearn_stages, and skintegrate (unreachable when packages installed)
- Fix flake8 E501 line-too-long errors in test files
- Add missing-dep tests for Imputer, TfidfVectorizeTokenLists, Decompose,
  EncodeLabel, PdPipelineAndSklearnEstimator, pdpipe_scorer_from_sklearn_scorer
  to bring sklearn_stages.py patch coverage to 100%"

commit.message:
fix(llm): long cooldown (1h) on quota-exhausted 429 vs generic rate-limit

When MiniMax returns 'usage limit exceeded', the daily token quota is
exhausted. Retrying every 30s is pointless and burns API calls.

- Detect 'usage limit exceeded' in error string → 3600s cooldown
- Generic 429 (per-minute rate limit) keeps the 30s cooldown
- Same fix applied to both chat() and stream() paths

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

commit.message:
feat(elf): add comprehensive validation for dynamic tag values

Implements Issue 1.5 from IMPROVEMENT_FINDINGS.md (MEDIUM SEVERITY).

Changes:
- Add validateDynEntries() function to validate all critical dynamic tags
- Address-type tags (DT_SYMTAB, DT_STRTAB, DT_RELA, DT_JMPREL, etc.) must:
  * Be non-zero
  * Fall within [BaseVAddr, BaseVAddr+MemSize) address range
- Size-type tags (DT_STRSZ, DT_RELASZ, DT_PLTRELSZ) must:
  * DT_STRSZ must be non-zero if present
  * Not exceed total MemSize
- Validation occurs in readDynamicSection() after parsing entries
- Clear error messages identify which tag is invalid and provide context

Impact:
Malformed ELF files with invalid dynamic tags now fail early with clear
errors instead of causing out-of-bounds access during relocation or
symbol resolution.

Also marked completed items in IMPROVEMENT_FINDINGS.md:
- 1.1 Integer Overflow in RelaEnt Calculation ✅ (already fixed)
- 1.2 Bounds Validation Missing in Symbol Index Lookup ✅ (already fixed)
- 1.3 String Table Bounds Not Validated ✅ (already fixed)
- 1.4 Relocation Offset Not Validated ✅ (already fixed)
- 1.5 DynEntries Key Validation Missing ✅ (this commit)
- 2.1 Silent Relocation Errors in RelocationTags ✅ (already fixed)
- 2.2 Missing Error Handling in Symbol Table Loading ✅ (already fixed)
- 3.3 Dynamic Segment Not Validated for Completeness ✅ (already fixed)

Tests: All tests pass (excluding loader package race detector due to
pre-existing synthetic test data issue with checkptr).

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

commit.message:
fix: use correct case for OpenTime in installed config template (#9)

The config template used find_dependency(opentime) which fails on
case-sensitive Linux filesystems. The installed config file is
OpenTimeConfig.cmake (capital O and T), so find_dependency must use
the matching case.

The previous commit (e722603) fixed find_package in CMakeLists.txt but
missed the installed config template that downstream consumers use.

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

commit.message:
feat: wire StrategyRunner into pipeline execution for matrix/parallel fan-out

Integrate StrategyRunner into StageRunner.runSingleJob() so matrix and
parallel strategies actually expand into multiple job instances during
pipeline execution. Previously, StrategyRunner existed with unit tests
but was never called from the runtime path.

Changes:
- stage-runner.ts: Add runSingleJob→runStrategyJob→runJobInstance flow
  that detects strategy on RegularJobDefinition, expands via
  StrategyRunner, and runs instances with maxParallel throttling
- schema.ts: Use z.coerce.string() for matrix values to handle YAML
  booleans/numbers (e.g., optimize: true)
- variable-manager.ts: Add typeof guard in resolveRuntimeExpressions
  to handle non-string variable values gracefully
- runtime-execution.test.ts: Replace single basic matrix test with 6
  comprehensive E2E tests covering 2-config, 3-config, partial failure,
  maxParallel throttling, parallel strategy, and matrix with outputs
- README.md: Expand matrix strategy docs with env var syntax, parallel
  strategy section, and instance naming explanation

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

commit.message:
fix: plug memory leaks in MFA tracker, computed field cache, permission cache (#1073)

- MfaAttempts: add LastActivityUtc tracking + periodic scavenge (every 60s)
  that evicts entries idle >10 min. RegisterSuccess now removes the key
  entirely. Prevents unbounded growth from unique IP/user combinations.

- ComputedFieldService: add lazy scavenge (every 30s) that purges expired
  cache entries + hard cap at 10k entries. Previously expired entries
  accumulated forever in the ConcurrentDictionary.

- PermissionResolver: Invalidate() now clears the entire cache instead of
  only bumping the generation counter. Stale entries for inactive users
  previously accumulated indefinitely.

Co-authored-by: root <root@localhost.localdomain>
Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

Fix sync loop not responding promptly to new files or force sync

The sync loop was calling time.sleep(sync_interval) unconditionally,
causing watchdog events and force sync signals to be ignored for up to
5 minutes (the default sync interval).

- Add threading.Event (_wakeup_event) to SyncDaemon
- Set the event in SyncEventHandler._queue_change so watchdog-detected
  file changes wake the sync loop immediately
- Replace time.sleep(sync_interval) with a 1-second polling loop that
  breaks early on _wakeup_event or force_sync_path signal file

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

commit.message:
fix: disable mmc1 (WiFi SDIO) in U-Boot DTS to fix eMMC boot

When mmc1 (mmc@1c10000, the BCM4330 SDIO host) is enabled in the U-Boot
DTS without MMC aliases, the block layer assigns devnums by DT scan order:

  mmc@1c0f000 (SD)   -> devnum 0
  mmc@1c10000 (WiFi) -> devnum 1  [steals the eMMC slot]
  mmc@1c11000 (eMMC) -> devnum 2

sunxi board.c maps BOOT_DEVICE_MMC2 (eMMC boot) to mmc_get_env_dev()=1,
so U-Boot looks for the FAT boot partition on 'mmc 1'. With WiFi bound as
devnum 1, every eMMC-boot attempt fails:

  Loading Environment from FAT... ** Bad device specification mmc 1 **

U-Boot then falls through to PXE and never accesses the eMMC boot
partition, making eMMC installs unbootable.

Fix: add patches/uboot/0002 which sets status = "disabled" on the mmc1
node in sun9i-a80-cubieboard4.dts. U-Boot does not use WiFi during boot.
With mmc1 removed from DM binding:

  mmc@1c0f000 (SD)   -> devnum 0  (BOOT_DEVICE_MMC1 -> mmc 0) [correct]
  mmc@1c11000 (eMMC) -> devnum 1  (BOOT_DEVICE_MMC2 -> mmc 1) [correct]

To apply: rm build/sources/u-boot-2024.01/.patched && scripts/build-uboot.sh

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

commit.message:
fix(wasm): downgrade Emscripten 3.1.50 -> 3.1.43 to match Qt 6.6.3 emval ABI

Root cause: Qt 6.6.3 was prebuilt with Emscripten 3.1.37. At Emscripten
3.1.44, the emval implementation was changed so that _emval_new,
_emval_call_void_method etc. moved from compiled WASM objects to
JavaScript-only. Qt 6.6.3's libqwasm.a still references these as WASM
symbols; wasm-ld cannot resolve them when linking against 3.1.50.

Fix: use Emscripten 3.1.43 — the last version with WASM-compiled emval,
which is binary-compatible with Qt 6.6.3's prebuilt objects. 3.1.37 itself
was removed from GCS storage; 3.1.43 is the nearest available version.

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

commit.message:
fix: network bandwidth shows N/A instead of 0 for undocumented SKUs

Two bugs caused old SKUs (Standard_D3, original D-series, etc.) to show
'0 Mbps' instead of 'N/A':

1. Azure Table Storage coerces None integer properties to 0 on write.
   Fix: skip adding networkBandwidthMbps to entity when value is None
   so the property is never written to storage for undocumented SKUs.

2. formatBandwidth(0) rendered '0 Mbps' - only guarded against null/undefined.
   Fix: treat 0 as no-data since no VM genuinely has 0 Mbps bandwidth.

Old SKUs without published bandwidth data (original D-series, Av1, etc.)
will now correctly display N/A in the UI.

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

refactor: reduce parseCache complexity from 17.9 to 7.0

Split parseCache into focused helper functions to improve code quality and maintainability:
- validateCacheData: validates file size and magic header
- parseCacheHeader: reads cache file header structure
- parseCacheEntries: processes all cache entries into map
- shouldIncludeEntry: filters entries by architecture and library type

Results:
- Main function complexity reduced by 60.9% (17.9 → 7.0)
- All helper functions below complexity threshold (≤10)
- Zero test regressions - all existing tests pass
- Improved separation of concerns and readability

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

commit.message:
Add Route 6 vs Route 7 benchmark comparison handover

Comprehensive benchmark comparison across both question sets:
- Route 7 beats Route 6 on Q-D (55/57 vs 53/57) and Q-G (53/57 vs 52/57)
- Route 7 is 40-50% faster with 2x shorter responses
- Zero questions where Route 6 passes and Route 7 fails
- Deep dive on Q-G6 (shared blind spot) and Q-G10 (Route 6's only edge)
- Clarification: Route 7 does NOT use community summaries in synthesis

repository.description: A unified Model Context Protocol (MCP) server that aggregates, indexes, and dynamically serves over 200+ specialized Agent Skills, Prompts, and Coding Workflows to AI assistants.

commit.message:
fix: add query tracking to /chat/stream + store DI polygon geometry in Sentence.metadata

- /chat/stream now calls QuotaEnforcer.record_query() and _write_cosmos_usage()
  after each successful query, so dashboard query counters increment
- extract_sentences_from_di_units() now reads DI geometry metadata (sentences
  with polygons + page_dimensions) and matches to wtpsplit sentences via text
  overlap for pixel-accurate PDF highlighting
- lazygraphrag_pipeline builds Sentence.metadata with matched polygon data
- Citation highlight pipeline: DI → sentence extraction → Neo4j → retrieval →
  API → frontend is now fully connected (requires re-index for existing docs)

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

Fix #49 #50 #51 #52: mobile layout, bigger buttons, AI organize, remove minimap

#49/#50 Mobile fixes:
- Stats panel stays top-left on mobile
- Bottom menu toggle button 60% bigger (16px font, 10px padding)
- Menu bar buttons 40% bigger touch targets (12px, 8px padding, 36px min-height)

#51 AI Auto-Organize:
- When first AI reaches Lv.4 (legendary): choice dialog appears
- Allow  buildings auto-arrange in concentric circles on AI place/upgrade
- Decline  manual control forever, option gone
- Lv.3 AI shows hint about Lv.4 unlock
- Buildings sorted by type and placed in spiral pattern

#52 Minimap removed:
- drawMinimap method and call deleted entirely

Fixes #49 #50 #51 #52

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>
